title: Japanese Broccoli Casserole
description: A unique fusion of American and Japanese flavors in a comforting casserole. This dish is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: casserole sauce
ingredients.notes: available at most Japanese grocery stores

instructions: Steam the broccoli until tender. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked rice, tangy cheese, fluffy cream cheese, and casserole sauce. Mix well.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Add the cooked broccoli on top of the rice mixture.
Pour the remaining rice mixture over the broccoli.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
